# HELP go_goroutines Number of goroutines that currently exist.
# TYPE go_goroutines gauge
go_goroutines 42

# HELP kueue_resource_flavor_quota_reserved_workloads Number of reserved workloads.
# TYPE kueue_resource_flavor_quota_reserved_workloads gauge
kueue_resource_flavor_quota_reserved_workloads{cluster_queue="default",flavor="on-demand"} 3

# HELP kueue_cluster_queue_resource_usage Reports the cluster_queue's total resource usage within all the flavors.
# TYPE kueue_cluster_queue_resource_usage gauge
kueue_cluster_queue_resource_usage{cohort="default",cluster_queue="default",flavor="on-demand",resource="cpu",replica_role="leader"} 1
kueue_cluster_queue_resource_usage{cohort="default",cluster_queue="default",flavor="on-demand",resource="example.com/fpga",replica_role="leader"} 3
kueue_cluster_queue_resource_usage{cohort="default",cluster_queue="default",flavor="on-demand",resource="nvidia.com/gpu",replica_role="leader"} 2

# HELP kueue_local_queue_pending_workloads The number of pending workloads, per local_queue and status.
# TYPE kueue_local_queue_pending_workloads gauge
kueue_local_queue_pending_workloads{name="gpu",namespace="team-a",status="active",replica_role="leader"} 1
# HELP go_goroutines Number of goroutines that currently exist.
# TYPE go_goroutines gauge
go_goroutines 42

# HELP kueue_resource_flavor_quota_reserved_workloads Number of reserved workloads.
# TYPE kueue_resource_flavor_quota_reserved_workloads gauge
kueue_resource_flavor_quota_reserved_workloads{cluster_queue="default",flavor="on-demand"} 3
